navigation.learningPaths: 7 structured paths: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta
navigation.sidebar: Click hamburger menu in top-left for Home, Modules, Learning Paths, and progress

description: Comprehensive DSA learning platform with 24 modules, learning paths, videos, quizzes, and practice problems

features.problems: Code editor with JavaScript, Python, Java, C support

commonQuestions.trackProgress: Open sidebar to see streak, active days, and activity calendar
commonQuestions.howToStart: Click hamburger menu, choose Modules or Learning Paths. Start with Beginner Path if new!
commonQuestions.logout: Open sidebar and click Sign Out at bottom
commonQuestions.walkthroughs: Find in Walkthrough tab - interactive step-by-step explanations
commonQuestions.whichPath: Beginner (30d) if new, Intermediate (45d) if basics known, Advanced (60d) for FAANG, or company tracks
commonQuestions.practice: Use Problems tab with built-in editor for JavaScript, Python, Java, or C
